domains.label: Core Concept Understanding
domains.description: Accurately understands the central concepts of the module.

domains.label: Clinical Application
domains.description: Applies module concepts to realistic clinical decisions or scenarios.

domains.label: Prioritization and Decision-Making
domains.description: Identifies what matters most and sequences actions appropriately.

domains.label: Justification
domains.description: Explains why a choice or recommendation is appropriate using module-based reasoning.

domains.label: Boundaries and Uncertainty
domains.description: Recognizes cautions, limitations, contraindications, and uncertainty.

domains.label: Mastery Depth
domains.description: Shows the level of understanding expected for successful completion of the module.

0.label: Incorrect, unsafe, or not demonstrated
0.description: Response is wrong, unsafe, or shows no engagement with module content.

1.label: Major gaps
1.description: Significant deficiencies that would indicate the module was not understood.

2.label: Partially demonstrated
2.description: Some correct understanding but with notable gaps. Would not pass a mastery check.

3.label: Adequate mastery
3.description: Demonstrates the level of understanding expected for successful module completion.

4.label: Strong mastery
4.description: Goes beyond minimum competency. Nuanced application and awareness of limits.

5.label: Excellent mastery
5.description: Exceptional integration of module content. Demonstrates deep understanding and confident application.
